recommendations.title: 3 Generations
recommendations.overview: A teenager transitions from female to male, and his family must come to terms with that fact.

recommendations.title: The Hot Spot
recommendations.overview: Upon arriving to a small town, a drifter quickly gets into trouble with the local authorities — and the local women — after he robs a bank.

recommendations.title: Colors
recommendations.overview: A confident young cop is shown the ropes by a veteran partner in the dangerous gang-controlled barrios of Los Angeles, where the gang culture is enforced by the colors the members wear.

recommendations.title: Easy Rider
recommendations.overview: Wyatt and Billy, two Harley-riding hippies, complete a drug deal in Southern California and decide to travel cross-country in search of spiritual truth.

recommendations.title: El Camino: A Breaking Bad Movie
recommendations.overview: In the wake of his dramatic escape from captivity, Jesse Pinkman must come to terms with his past in order to forge some kind of future.

recommendations.title: Catchfire
recommendations.overview: A witness to a mob assassination flees for her life from town to town, switching identities, but cannot seem to elude Milo, the chief killer out to get her.

recommendations.title: The Good Neighbor
recommendations.overview: Two high school filmmakers decide to create the illusion of a haunting on an unsuspecting neighbor.

recommendations.title: Jamie Marks Is Dead
recommendations.overview: No one seemed to care about Jamie Marks until after his death. Hoping to find the love and friendship he never had in life, Jamie’s ghost visits former classmate Adam McCormick, drawing him into the bleak world between the living and the dead.

recommendations.title: The Shadow's Edge
recommendations.overview: Macau Police brings the tracking expert police officer out of retirement to help catch a dangerous group of professional thieves.

recommendations.title: Mobsters
recommendations.overview: The story of a group of friends in turn of the century New York, from their early days as street hoods to their rise in the world of organized crime...
